title: ferray-fft: no out= parameter on any FFT function
description:
Goal: 

Acceptance criteria:
- 

NumPy's FFT functions accept out= to write results into a pre-allocated array: np.fft.fft(a, out=result). This avoids allocation on repeated transforms of same-sized data (common in real-time signal processing). ferray-fft always allocates a new output array. The FftPlan type partially addresses this (plan reuse) but still allocates output. Add out= variants or _into methods for at least fft/ifft/rfft/irfft.
